channel.title: Latest from Android Central
channel.description: All the latest content from the Android Central team

item.title: Ultrahuman seeks to define: M2 Live keeps your metabolic health close with a small sensor
item.description: Ultrahuman launches M2 Live with Abbott's Lingo biosensor to help users take their glucose (metabolic health) more seriously with a continuous monitor.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Ultrahuman introduces Lingo sensors with Abbott for continuous glucose monitoring to help users manage their metabolic health more seriously.
media:content.media:text: Ultrahuman introduces Lingo sensors with Abbott for continuous glucose monitoring to help users manage their metabolic health more seriously.
media:content.media:title: Ultrahuman introduces Lingo sensors with Abbott for continuous glucose monitoring to help users manage their metabolic health more seriously.

item.title: Google Health returns 'Hourly Activity' in June, tosses in extra for Android
item.description: Google Health app received a large June update, rolling out new tools and features for Android.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Google Health app Today tab focus metrics
media:content.media:text: Google Health app Today tab focus metrics
media:content.media:title: Google Health app Today tab focus metrics

item.title: This is still the best Samsung Galaxy S26 deal on the web, and nobody is talking about it
item.description: Mint Mobile is still running an offer that gives you $500 off the Galaxy S26 and 50% off a year of the Unlimited plan.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:text: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.
media:content.media:title: The Samsung Galaxy S26 in lifestyle shots.

item.title: Prime Day Kindle deals just dropped early — score up to 42% off Paperwhite, Scribe, Colorsoft, and more
item.description: Amazon is slashing up to 38% off some of its best Kindle e-readers, days before Prime Day is set to go live.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Amazon Kindle Scribe
media:content.media:text: Amazon Kindle Scribe
media:content.media:title: Amazon Kindle Scribe

item.title: Nothing’s Carl Pei says he's going to steal Apple’s customers “one bored iPhone user at a time”
item.description: Nothing is taking its anti-Apple fight to US store shelves, but despite Carl Pei's bold talk, Apple's ecosystem remains a much tougher opponent than any Instagram stunt.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Carl pei
media:content.media:text: Carl pei
media:content.media:title: Carl pei

item.title: Android 17 review: Bubbling with excitement
item.description: The stable build of Android 17 is now available, and I used it on my Pixel 10, Pixel 10 Pro XL, and Pixel 10 Pro Fold. This is the rundown of all the new features, and what you need to know about using Android 17 on your device.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Android 17 Easter egg on Pixel 10, 10 Pro XL and Pixel 10 Pro Fold
media:content.media:text: Android 17 Easter egg on Pixel 10, 10 Pro XL and Pixel 10 Pro Fold
media:content.media:title: Android 17 Easter egg on Pixel 10, 10 Pro XL and Pixel 10 Pro Fold

item.title: Nightmarish Galaxy S23 reports after downloading One UI 8.5 have me terrified
item.description: Problems reportedly surfaced for users downloading One UI 8.5 with a Galaxy S23 Ultra.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Samsung Galaxy S23
media:content.media:text: Samsung Galaxy S23
media:content.media:title: Samsung Galaxy S23

item.title: The Honor Watch 6 wants to outlast your next vacation
item.description: The Honor Watch 6 bets on what users really want: up to 35 days of battery life, solid fitness tracking, and fewer reasons to reach for a charger.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Honor Watch 6 in brown and back side by side
media:content.media:text: Honor Watch 6 in brown and back side by side
media:content.media:title: Honor Watch 6 in brown and back side by side

item.title: Google's extensive June security update fixes tons of lingering Pixel problems
item.description: Google detailed its massive June security patch for Pixels, which brings a ton of fixes aimed at solving lingering issues.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: Pixel 10d
media:content.media:text: Pixel 10d
media:content.media:title: Pixel 10d

item.title: I barely use Gemini's default chatbot after trying the new Gemini Live interface
item.description: Google recently overhauled the Gemini app, but the main chatbot experience isn't the best part. Gemini Live is finally useful for everyday queries.
item.author: bradypsnyder@gmail.com (Brady Snyder)
item.dc:creator: Brady Snyder

media:content.media:description: The Neural Expressive Gemini interface on a Razr Fold.
media:content.media:text: The Neural Expressive Gemini interface on a Razr Fold.
media:content.media:title: The Neural Expressive Gemini interface on a Razr Fold.

item.title: 'More data than ever': Android 17 has just what iPhone users need to switch over
item.description: Google revealed an upgraded Android Switch tool for Android 17 that completely transfers your iPhone's data to a new phone.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Android 17 logo on a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:text: The Android 17 logo on a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra
media:content.media:title: The Android 17 logo on a Samsung Galaxy S25 Ultra

item.title: I was tired of the Android Beta for Pixel glitching out, so I left it — without losing all my data
item.description: Did you sign up for the Android Beta for Pixel program but are regretting it now? Don't worry, there's a way to exit the program without losing all your data.
item.author: namerah.saud-fatmi@futurenet.com (Namerah Saud Fatmi)
item.dc:creator: Namerah Saud Fatmi

media:content.media:description: Small red Android figurine holding a green sign that read "Android Beta"
media:content.media:text: Small red Android figurine holding a green sign that read "Android Beta"
media:content.media:title: Small red Android figurine holding a green sign that read "Android Beta"

item.title: Verizon quietly launches the absurdly cheap Simplicity Plan — unlimited wireless starting at just $30 per month
item.description: Verizon just launched a new wireless plan that could make its 5G Ultra Wideband network more accessible than ever before.
item.author: patrick.farmer@futurenet.com (Patrick Farmer)
item.dc:creator: Patrick Farmer

media:content.media:description: Verizon's V logo
media:content.media:text: Verizon's V logo
media:content.media:title: Verizon's V logo

item.title: I use this thermal camera to fix overheating tech, and it just got an early Prime Day deal
item.description: Thermal cameras are a great way to identify and troubleshoot overheating gadgets, and Thermal Master's P4 is the best one I've used yet. The best part? It's on sale right now.
item.author: harish.jonnalagadda@futurenet.com (Harish Jonnalagadda)
item.dc:creator: Harish Jonnalagadda

media:content.media:description: Thermal Master P4 thermal camera testing
media:content.media:text: Thermal Master P4 thermal camera testing
media:content.media:title: Thermal Master P4 thermal camera testing

item.title: I used the Oura Ring 4 for nearly two years, and it's still one of the best low-key health and fitness trackers you can buy, especially now that it's as much as $100 off
item.description: The Oura Ring 4 remains a fantastic option for anyone seeking a distraction-free health and fitness tracker, and it's on sale ahead of Prime Day.
item.author: derrek.lee@futurenet.com (Derrek Lee)
item.dc:creator: Derrek Lee

media:content.media:description: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic in hand
media:content.media:text: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic in hand
media:content.media:title: Oura Ring 4 Ceramic in hand

item.title: Google's new Home Speaker is here: Gemini built-in, upgraded sound, and a $99 price tag
item.description: Google's new Home Speaker pairs Gemini AI with upgraded audio and a surprisingly affordable $99 price tag.
item.author: sanujb6@gmail.com (Sanuj Bhatia)
item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: Google's new home speaker
media:content.media:text: Google's new home speaker
media:content.media:title: Google's new home speaker

item.title: Samsung hits a triple: One UI 9 Beta 3 is here for enrolled Galaxy S26 phones
item.description: Samsung reportedly rolled out One UI 9 Beta 3 to Galaxy S26 phones in a few regions.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: The OnePlus 16 might be the closest we've come to a bezel-free phone
item.description: Bezels? What bezels?

item.dc:creator: Sanuj Bhatia

media:content.media:description: OnePlus's Never Settle motto on the OnePlus 15's display
media:content.media:text: OnePlus's Never Settle motto on the OnePlus 15's display
media:content.media:title: OnePlus's Never Settle motto on the OnePlus 15's display

item.title: Samsung shows off ultra-bright XR displays that could power future smart glasses
item.description: Samsung's new 40,000-nit XR displays could finally make slimmer AR glasses practical, but real-world products still need to prove they're more than flashy demos.
item.author: techkritiko@gmail.com (Jay Bonggolto)
item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

media:content.media:description: Samsung Display RGB OLEDoS exhibit at AWE USA 2026
media:content.media:text: Samsung Display RGB OLEDoS exhibit at AWE USA 2026
media:content.media:title: Samsung Display RGB OLEDoS exhibit at AWE USA 2026

item.title: Viture, Nvidia XR AI partner for safety glasses that bring true smarts to the workforce
item.description: Viture, Nvidia revealed the Helix safety smart glasses at AWE 2026, and these glasses feature strong AI for "assisted workflows."
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

media:content.media:description: The Viture Helix safety smart glasses powered by Nvidia XR AI.

item.title: Brand New Day: Samsung's foldables swing with Spider-Man, but you'll need the Spidey Tracker
item.description: Samsung, Spider-Man: Brand New Day swing into a real-world collaboration with the movie's Spidey Tracker.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: School's out: Android preps updated parental controls for kids alongside Android 17
item.description: Android 17 is here, and so are Google's updated parental controls for kids as school lets out for the summer.
item.author: nickodiaz@sbcglobal.net (Nickolas Diaz)
item.dc:creator: Nickolas Diaz

item.title: Wear OS 7 is here with better battery life and a massive smart home upgrade
item.description: Wear OS 7 brings smarter features, better battery life, and deeper Gemini integration to Pixel Watches, though Google's most exciting AI upgrades are still coming later this year.

item.title: Get it reserved: Xreal's Aura smart glasses refresh the game with powerful Android XR and AI

item.title: Why wait for Prime Day? The 'fantastic' Nothing Phone (3) has already scored a record-smashing discount at Amazon
item.description: The Nothing Phone (3) is one of the most unique phones on the market, and thanks to this early Prime Day deal, you can grab the device for its lowest price ever recorded.

item.title: I spent months testing the Honor Magic V6, and I'm not sure how foldables can get much better than this

item.title: Your inbox might finally get quieter now that Google is taking down a major AI scam ring
item.description: Google is teaming up with the FBI to sue the massive scam ring that weaponized Gemini to flood your phone with phishing texts.

item.dc:creator: Jay Bonggolto

item.title: Should you wait for the Samsung Galaxy Z Flip 8?
